bird.name: White-eared honeyeater
bird.summary: The white-eared honeyeater (Nesoptilotis leucotis) is a medium-sized honeyeater found in Australia. It is a member of the family Meliphagid…

locations.name: 约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)
locations.summary: 约翰·莱瑟姆（英語：John Latham，1740年6月27日—1837年2月4日）是一位英国医生、生态学家和作家，被认为是“澳大利亚鸟类学”之父，于19世纪初描述和命名了多种澳大利亚的鸟类。著有《A General Synopsis…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

relations.subject: White-eared honeyeater
relations.evidence: The white-eared honeyeater's preferred habitat is in forests, woodlands, heathlands, mallee and dry inland scrublands. A eucalyptus canopy, rough bark and a shrub layer are the most important requirements for white-eared honeyeaters
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: White-eared honeyeater
relations.evidence: Although the white-eared honeyeater has a decreasing population, it has an extensive distribution, and is considered to be of least concern on the IUCN Red List. Threats to the white-eared honeyeater include habitat degradation, fire and loss of understory
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
